name: Data.gov MCP Servers
what_it_does: Data.gov MCP server collection enabling AI agents to access US government open data — searching federal datasets across agencies, retrieving dataset metadata and download URLs, querying CKAN-based data catalogs, and integrating open government data into agent-driven research, policy analysis, and data science workflows.
use_cases: Searching federal government datasets from research and policy agents
Finding economic indicators and census data from economics research agents
Accessing FDA, EPA, and USDA datasets from regulatory compliance agents
Discovering geospatial and climate datasets from environmental analysis agents
Retrieving public health data from epidemiology research agents
Building data pipelines from US government open data from analytics agents
not_for: Non-US government data (use country-specific open data portals)
Real-time data needs (Data.gov is primarily static datasets)
Commercial/proprietary data (Data.gov is exclusively public/open data)
best_when: An agent needs to discover and access US federal government datasets from Data.gov — for policy research, academic analysis, or data journalism using publicly available government data.
avoid_when: You need real-time data, non-US government data, or commercial datasets.

auth.notes: No authentication required — Data.gov CKAN API is fully public. No API key needed for basic catalog search. Some individual agency APIs linked from Data.gov may require registration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — US government open data
pricing.notes: Data.gov is US government open data — completely free. MCP server is free open source from Metatool AI. No costs to access datasets.

performance.rate_limits: Data.gov API: generous public rate limits; no published limit

known_agent_gotchas: Dataset discovery is the strength — actual data download requires following dataset-specific URLs
Data.gov catalogs metadata; actual data files hosted by individual agencies
File formats vary widely: CSV, JSON, XML, GIS, Excel — agents must handle diverse formats
Some datasets are outdated — check 'last updated' metadata before using
Metatool AI MCP — quality reflects organization's broader MCP ecosystem work
CKAN API pagination required for large result sets
agent_readiness.security_notes: No auth required. Public US government data. HTTPS enforced. No credentials needed. Community MCP from Metatool AI. Public domain data — no ToS restrictions.

security_score_components.security_notes: No auth required. HTTPS enforced. Public government data. No credentials. Community MCP.
